title: Corrections
description: Public correction records for previously published cards, for the future /corrections page. Original field design -- the spec names this file without defining its shape (see IMPROVEMENT_BACKLOG.md). Top-level array, matching how pipeline/ci/apply_correction.py's append_correction_record actually writes data/corrections.json on disk (a real latent bug, found and fixed during the fact-check enhancement pass: this schema was originally typed as a single object, which would have failed validate_content's schema check the first time a real correction ever happened).
